mapper.insert: insert into user_video_progress(student_id, video_id, progress, last_watch_time) values(#{studentId}, #{videoId}, #{progress}, #{lastWatchTime})
mapper.select: SELECT progress FROM user_video_progress WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND video_id = #{videoId}
SELECT video_id FROM user_video_progress WHERE progress > 90 and student_id = #{userId}
SELECT u.id,u.student_id,u.video_id,u.progress FROM user_video_progress u LEFT JOIN course_resource c on u.video_id = c.id WHERE u.student_id = #{studentId} AND c.course_id = #{courseId}
